title: Cinderella
subTitle: Ella, a young woman, lives with her abusive stepmother, who treats her as the maid of the house. However, things change for the better when she encounters Kit, a young palace apprentice.

title: Nayyapudai
subTitle: A retired army officer returns to his home town looking forward to a life of peace and quiet. However, an untoward incident forces him to arm up against a local gangster.

title: Yaanum Theeyavan
subTitle: Michael and Soumya, a young married couple, are taken hostage by Pasupathy, a serial killer, and his men after Soumya witnesses a murder committed by him.

title: Skandha Sashti Kavasam
subTitle: A compilation of verses from a devotional song dedicated to Lord Murugan are played back to back to seek the holy blessings.

title: Shri Venkateswara Suprabhatam
subTitle: In veneration of Lord Venkateswara, devotees and priests listen to devotional songs and perform religious customs in order to seek his blessings.

title: Amrita Gangai
subTitle: Mata Amritanandamayi, a Hindu spiritual leader, delivers discourses and sings devotional songs to guide people to the path of righteousness.

title: Lady Detective Shadow
subTitle: Sima Feiyan, a lady investigator, intends to bring criminals to justice using her kung fu talents. So, she resolves to go across ancient China in order to purge the country of crooks.

title: KD
subTitle: When Karuppu Durai learns that his family has decided to perform euthanasia on him, he runs away from home. However, his life takes an unexpected turn when he meets Kutty, a young boy.

title: Kaala
subTitle: Haridev Abhayankar, a corrupt minister, wishes to seize Dharavi's lucrative land for his own gain. However, Karikaalan, the locality's godfather, fights to protect his people's rights and assets.

title: Sabhaapathy
subTitle: Sabhaapathy, a man with a speech impairment, desperately looks for a job to earn a living. One day, his life turns upside down as he ends up with a corrupt politician's suitcase filled with money.

title: Coffee
subTitle: A woman who aspires to be a cop, takes care of her brother after their parents die at a very young age. Later, she searches for him desperately after he gets abducted.

title: Capmaari
subTitle: Varsha, a young woman, likes Vijay, a married man and a colleague, and manipulates him to sleep with her. Later, when she falls pregnant, she forces her way into his house and ruins his married life.

title: En Rasavin Manasile
subTitle: Solaiamma hastily agrees to marry Mayandi as he is an alcoholic, but love blooms between the couple when Mayandi changes himself. However, he is shattered when she dies after giving birth to a baby.
